Notes: Single UPDATE carries two identical add_rr operations for the same RR; observe whether the server collapses duplicates, accepts them idempotently, or rejects the transaction.

Steps.Description: Add the same A RR twice in one UPDATE with no prerequisites.

Steps.Name: host2.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether host2.campus.edu. A exists after the UPDATE and whether only one RRset member is present.
